items.title: Southampton hit out at 'manifestly disproportionate' punishment
items.summary: Southampton also admitted "What happened was wrong" and apologised to the other clubs involved and their fans.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Ireland's Lewis rested for tri-series before World Cup
items.summary: Ireland captain Gaby Lewis says she will be fit for the start of next month's Women's T20 World Cup as she continues her recovery from injury.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
